package rulecoverage

func NegativeNoBatchingOnHandlerDrivenDbWriteLoop() string {
    ruleID := "no_batching_on_handler_driven_db_write_loop"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Request handlers that drive row-by-row DB writes with no batch path."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
